response_turn1:

REASON: The document accurately reflects ADEA core provisions (40+ threshold, 29 U.S.C. §§ 621 et seq.) but the EEOC Compliance Manual Section 8 on Age Discrimination was not issued in February 2018 and the specific framing around graduation-year filters and social-platform usage patterns appears to be editorially added rather than drawn from an actual EEOC compliance manual section.
